name: Diabetic Easter Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 package (artificially sweetened) vanilla or chocolate pudding powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in the top of a double boiler over boiling water.
2. Add the evaporated milk and mix until smooth.
3. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add the vanilla and sweetener, mixing well to combine.
5. Pour the mixture into a small foil pie pan or plate.
6. Allow to cool and chill in the refrigerator.
7. Once chilled, cut into 8 pieces.
8. Form the pieces into egg-shaped balls.
9. Roll each ball lightly in pudding powder or chopped nuts.
Note: The attribution line "WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models" has been removed as it is not part of the recipe instructions.
